overlay_content.name: Overlay Content
overlay_content.value: Genuine Nissan Accessories are custom-fit & durability-tested for your Altima. [*] Images shown for illustrative purposes only. For complete limited warranty details, see your Nissan dealer and read the vehicle’s Warranty Information Booklet.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
ALTIMA EXTERIOR ACCESSORIES

Make a lasting impression

Stand out with a wide array of accessories that put your sense of style on display and help guard against the unexpected. Your Altima can be equipped with many available accessories, such as a Rear Spoiler or a Satin Chrome Rear Bumper Protector.

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:

  • Add a sporty accent to your Altima
  • Comes pre-painted in factory-matched colors

modules.title: All-Season Floor Mats — High Wall Liners

html_content.name: Custom HTML Content
html_content.value:
All-Season Floor Mats — High Wall Liners (4-piece set)

  • Stepping in from the rain or snow? You need a set of All-Season Floor Mats — High Wall Liners
  • Custom-made of durable and long-wearing material
  • Driver and front-passenger liners secure with a grommet hole/positioning hook system

MSRP $195 [*] Price is Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP). MSRP excludes installation (except if factory-installed), taxes and other costs, and is subject to change without prior notice. Dealer sets actual price. Pictures are for informational purposes only.
